channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Data Centers Across the US: A Look into OpenAI's Expansion Plans
item.description: OpenAI is expanding its data center network across 16 states in the US to power its artificial intelligence technology, with a focus on renewable energy sources.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: The slash-and-burn tactics Musk brings to Washington often backfired at Twitter
item.description: When Elon Musk bought Twitter in 2022, he laid off thousands of employees, stopped paying rent and auctioned off coffee makers and office chairs in hopes of a big turnaround.
item.dc:creator: Matt O'Brien And Bernard Condon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Got IKEA smart lights? You can now control them directly from your Apple Watch
item.description: IKEA Home Smart is now available for watchOS, and will let you operate lamps and bulbs from your wrist.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Opinion: Tesla’s awful numbers put Musk back into campaign mode
item.description: Very little looks good on EV company's balance sheet, but Tesla chairman tries every way possible to spark excitement.
item.dc:creator: Liam Denning, The Mercury News

item.title: Bridgestone mejora las capacidades de desarrollo virtual de neumáticos con su propio simulador
item.description: Bridgestone, la compañía especializada en neumáticos y soluciones de movilidad sostenible, ha avanzado la inversión de un nuevo simulador de conducción en circuito (DiL, por sus siglas en inglés) en su centro de I+D en la región de EMEA.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Indian banks are getting a whole new domain to combat fraud
item.description: The Reserve Bank of India is mandating the use of new and exclusive domains for banks to prove their legitimacy.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Repsol impulsa su estrategia digital con la incorporación de agentes de IA
item.description: Repsol ha anunciado la ampliación del acuerdo de colaboración suscrito con Accenture con el fin de continuar avanzando hacia los objetivos de su Programa Digital.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Full-stack JavaScript leads the way
item.description: Building web apps begins with a simple premise, but the real-world experience is a juggling act of optimizations, best practices, toolchains, and so on. Developers tend to respond by doing what we do best: creating new tools and techniques to manage ever-changing demands.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: The number of snakes removed from this Australian yard will make you shudder
item.description: A man described feeling “the shudders” as more than 100 venomous red-bellied black snakes were removed from a pile of mulch in his Sydney backyard.
item.dc:creator: Rod Mcguirk, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: OpenAI picks Texas for ‘flagship’ data center in Stargate project
item.description: ChatGPT maker OpenAI said on Thursday that Texas will be the “flagship” data center site in the Stargate project it is building with SoftBank. Around 16 states have indicated interest in building data centers for Stargate, an OpenAI executive said on a conference call.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Like TikTok, lawmakers want to ban DeepSeek from government devices
item.description: A bipartisan duo in the the U.S. House is proposing legislation to ban the Chinese artificial intelligence app DeepSeek from federal devices, similar to the policy already in place for the popular social media platform TikTok. Reps. Josh Gottheimer, D-N.J., and Darin LaHood, R-Ill.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Nebraska government system shutdown disrupts the Legislature, DMV and other offices
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — A systemwide outage of state goverment computers shut down everything from the work of the Legislature to driver’s licensing offices for several hours Thursday.
item.dc:creator: MARGERY A. BECK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NetSuite Expands AI Capabilities to Enhance Customization and Workflow Efficiency
item.description: NetSuite continues to advance its AI capabilities, introducing new features that enhance customization and workflow efficiency for enterprises.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Fast fashion, laptops and toys are likely to cost more due to US tariffs on Chinese imports
item.description: A sweeping new U.S. tariff on products made in China is expected to increase the prices American consumers pay for a wide array of products, from the ultra-cheap apparel sold on online shopping platforms to toys and electronic devices such as computers and cellphones.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly introduced pornography app available in the European Union, warning that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AWS tightens default security on Redshift
item.description: Amazon’s security improvements for its AWS Redshift managed data warehouse service are welcome additions, says an expert.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Federal Executive Forum IT Modernization and Transformation Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025
item.description: How are agencies profiling a successful IT modernization strategy and what is the vision for the future? The post Federal Executive Forum IT Modernization and Transformation Strategies in Government Progress and Best Practices 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: CIOs grapple with subpar global genAI models
item.description: With the number of generative AI trials soaring in the enterprise, it is typical for the CIO to purchase numerous large language models from various model makers, tweaked for different geographies and languages.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Canada's most populous province to pause retaliatory measures as US puts tariffs on hold
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — The leader of Ontario, Canada’s most populous province, said Monday he will pause all retaliatory measures against the United States after news broke that the threat of tariffs has been put on hold for a month.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: CISA hires former DHS CIO into top cyber position
item.description: Karen Evans is returning to the Department of Homeland Security in a top cyber job as DHS responds to major hacks into U.S. critical infrastructure. The post CISA hires former DHS CIO into top cyber position first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Taiwan chip tariff would raise industry costs, analysts say
item.description: President Donald Trump continues to use tariffs like a club to get his way, and is threatening to place tariffs on computer chips made in Taiwan, warning the additional charges could reach as high as 100%.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Big rigs deliver cargo with no humans at the wheel
item.description: First driverless semi delivers 100 loads in Texas, transforming logistics with AI. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives his takeaways.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SoftBank and OpenAI set up joint company to push artificial intelligence services
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology giant SoftBank Group and OpenAI stepped up their AI partnership Monday, setting up a 50-50 held company called SB OpenAI Japan.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
